steps.t: It is after midnight at Helm's Deep. Gimli is by the postern gate, below the north-west tower.
It is after midnight at Helm's Deep. Gimli has asked you to check on Gléowine by the map table west of the Hornburg.
Gléowine wants you to set the fallen barrel of weapons upright. <rgb=#FF0000>Interacting with the tipped-over barrel near Gléowine will allow ti…
In the hours before dawn, the forces of Saruman press their advantage. Théoden King is outside the Hornburg.
In the hours before dawn, the forces of Saruman press their advantage. Aragorn is on the second level, outside the entrance to the Hornburg.
In the hours before dawn, the forces of Saruman press their advantage. Aragorn wants you to hurry to the breach in the Deeping Wall, east of the Hornb…
In the hours before dawn, the forces of Saruman press their advantage. Aragorn is on the second level, outside the entrance to the Hornburg.
